oversightFindingsTriage.title: Phase C versus Phase E dependency coherence requires explicit decision record
oversightFindingsTriage.rationale: Codebase review confirms exact DrawingRevision provenance is NOT guaranteed for knowledge/commercial template chain. Growth payloads (knowledgeTemplateReviewGrowthService, knowledgeTemplatePublicationGrowthService) carry templateRevisionId (Knowledge Library template version) not drawing revision IDs. linkedRevisionIds is optional call-time context for viewer chrome subscription only ÃƒÆ’Ã†â€™Ãƒâ€ Ã¢â‚¬â„¢ÃƒÆ’Ã¢â‚¬Å¡Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â¢ÃƒÆ’Ã†â€™Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â¢ÃƒÆ’Ã‚Â¢ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â‚¬Å¡Ã‚Â¬Ãƒâ€¦Ã‚Â¡ÃƒÆ’Ã¢â‚¬Å¡Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â¬ÃƒÆ’Ã†â€™Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â¢ÃƒÆ’Ã‚Â¢ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã…Â¡Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â¬ÃƒÆ’Ã¢â‚¬Å¡Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â not persisted in Memory audit payloads for template review/publication. LessonsLearnedCapture type has no sourceRevisionIds field. drawing_revision_superseded events exist (revisionDetectionService) but no knowledge invalidation/revalidation hook. Cross-ref timeline tracks revisionId but is not linked to knowledge template chain. VariationEvidenceLink supports entityType drawing_revision but knowledge pipeline does not consume it. Superseded drawing invalidation and approved-knowledge revalidation on source revision change are not implemented.

securityInterrupts.title: SECURITY DEFINER write_audit_entry callable without project membership check
securityInterrupts.rationale: Live Security Advisor triage 2026-07-10: public.write_audit_entry(...) is SECURITY DEFINER with search_path=public, EXECUTE granted to authenticated (and anon via PUBLIC). Body only guards auth.uid() IS NOT NULL ÃƒÆ’Ã†â€™Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â¢ÃƒÆ’Ã‚Â¢ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã…Â¡Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â¬ÃƒÆ’Ã‚Â¢ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â‚¬Å¡Ã‚Â¬Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â any signed-in user can insert audit_log rows for arbitrary project_id (audit forgery / data-integrity). Trigger wrappers audit_*_row are lower risk (trigger context). Not a Migration 015 regression; pre-existing from 003_sprint2_audit_and_writes.sql.
securityInterrupts.targetSprintOrMilestone: Immediate security remediation sprint (non-blocking for unrelated roadmap sprints)
objects: public.write_audit_entry(uuid, text, text, text, text, text, text)
securityInterrupts.remediation: Add is_project_member(p_project_id) guard (or restrict EXECUTE to service_role / revoke from authenticated/PUBLIC); keep search_path pinned.
securityInterrupts.note: Remains open until production deployment of membership guard, negative security tests, and completionEvidence are recorded. Canvas marker lifecycle validation automation (1180-1189) records in-repo harness + probe attempt only and does NOT satisfy this gate unless all three gates are REAL. write_audit_entry remains open_interrupt until production deploy + negative security tests + completionEvidence are ACTUALLY recorded.

governanceInterrupts.title: Oversight publication integrity — publicStateJsonParsePassed / triple-route identity
governanceInterrupts.rationale: Root causes: (1) unauthenticated GitHub API rate-limit 403 → jsonParseExit=1; (2) git show execSync default maxBuffer 1MB insufficient for ~2.8MB STATE. Fixed auth via GITHUB_TOKEN/GCM and maxBuffer=32MB. Authoritative identity is GitHub API + git origin; raw CDN may lag briefly.
governanceInterrupts.targetSprintOrMilestone: Immediate governance repair (non-blocking for roadmap sprints)
